hero.title: Hotel MAXIMA
hero.subtitle: MAXIMA-lly convenient – just like home! Rest in Kamianets-Podilskyi

about.title: About Our Hotel
about.content: Hotel complex 'Maxima' is a cozy, private family-type hotel. We are located just 500 meters from the unique 'Running Fawn' bridge. Our hotel accommodates up to 20 guests, allowing us to provide personalized service to everyone. It's your home and a shelter for your car, your office when needed, and a place for true relaxation.

important.title: Important Information
important.beds_desc: We can provide extra beds or cribs. Please contact management for details.
important.prepayment_desc: Management will contact you regarding prepayment (due within 5 days). AC usage may incur an additional fee.

services.title: Our Services & Amenities
services.food: Breakfast included, custom dinner on request
services.in_room: In Rooms: TV, Hairdryer, Kettle, Wi-Fi

standard.name: Standard Double Room
standard.features: TV, kettle, hairdryer, mosquito net, courtyard view

comfort.name: Comfort Double Room
comfort.features: 18 sq. m, city view, Wi-Fi, TV

junior_suite.name: Junior Suite
junior_suite.features: 32 sq. m, balcony, terrace, AC, TV

comfort_junior.name: Comfort Junior Suite
comfort_junior.beds: 2 single beds and a sofa (up to 5 people)
comfort_junior.features: 40 sq. m, AC, refrigerator, TV, 3 armchairs

footer.address: 41b Hrushevskoho Ave, Kamianets-Podilskyi (500m from 'Running Fawn' bridge)
